player_news.description: Will not return right lower leg

headlines.description: — Paolo Banchero and Desmond Bane each scored 25 points, and the Orlando Magic blew a 17-point fourth-quarter lead before rallying to beat the Detroit Pistons 113-105 on Saturday for a 2-1 lead in their Eastern Conference first-round series.
headlines.shortLinkText: Banchero and Bane each score 25, Magic waste big lead but rally to top Pistons 113-105 for 2-1 lead

headlines.description: — Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 42 points in a brilliant shooting performance, Ajay Mitchell added 15 in place of the injured Jalen Williams and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Phoenix Suns 121-109 on Saturday to take a 3-0 lead in the Western...
headlines.shortLinkText: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 42, Thunder beat Suns 121-109 to take a 3-0 series lead

headlines.description: — Karl-Anthony Towns had his first postseason triple-double, OG Anunoby scored 22 points and the New York Knicks recovered after back-to-back losses to beat the Atlanta Hawks 114-98 on Saturday night, tying the Eastern Conference playoff series at 2-2.
headlines.shortLinkText: Towns has a triple-double and the Knicks beat the Hawks 114-98 to tie the series at 2-2

headlines.description: — When the Minnesota Timberwolves acquired Ayo Dosunmu from Chicago in February, they expected to get a strong defender and savvy offensive player. If he wants to be an elite scorer, they'll take that, too.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dosunmu scores 43 points as Timberwolves overcome injuries to beat Nuggets 112-96 for 3-1 lead
